mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TB_FOLLOW F USING ( SELECT #{userNumb} AS USER_NUMB , #{flowNumb} AS FLOW_NUMB FROM DUAL ) S ON (F.USER_NUMB = S.USER_NUMB AND F.FLOW_NUMB = S.FLOW_NUMB) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_NUMB, FLOW_NUMB, REGI_DATE) VALUES (S.USER_NUMB, S.FLOW_NUMB, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT /* getLikeDtl */ R.TAGT_TYPE , R.TAGT_NUMB , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO FROM ( SELECT #{tagtType} AS TAGT_TYPE , #{tagtNumb} AS TAGT_NUMB FROM DUAL ) R LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.TAGT_TYPE , L.TAGT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_LIKEXX L WHERE L.TAGT_TYPE = #{tagtType} AND L.TAGT_NUMB = #{tagtNumb} GROUP BY L.TAGT_TYPE, L.TAGT_NUMB ) LC ON LC.TAGT_TYPE = R.TAGT_TYPE AND LC.TAGT_NUMB = R.TAGT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.TAGT_TYPE , L.TAGT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_LIKEXX L WHERE L.TAGT_TYPE = #{tagtType} AND L.TAGT_NUMB = #{tagtNumb} AND L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON UL.TAGT_TYPE = R.TAGT_TYPE AND UL.TAGT_NUMB = R.TAGT_NUMB

SELECT /* getFollowingList */ U.USER_NUMB , U.USER_NICK , U.INTR_CNTN , F.FILE_PATH AS PORF_PATH , CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN #{commYes} ELSE #{commNo} END AS ME_YSNO , CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN NULL ELSE FN_GET_FOLW_STAT(#{loginUserNumb}, U.USER_NUMB) END AS FOLLOW_STAT_NAME FROM TB_FOLLOW FL INNER JOIN TM_USERXM U ON U.USER_NUMB = FL.FLOW_NUMB LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM F ON F.FILE_NUMB = U.PROF_NUMB WHERE FL.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ORDER BY CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END , FL.REGI_DATE DESC , U.USER_NUMB DESC

SELECT /* getFollowerList */ U.USER_NUMB , U.USER_NICK , U.INTR_CNTN , F.FILE_PATH AS PORF_PATH , CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN #{commYes} ELSE #{commNo} END AS ME_YSNO , CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN NULL ELSE FN_GET_FOLW_STAT(#{loginUserNumb}, U.USER_NUMB) END AS FOLLOW_STAT_NAME FROM TB_FOLLOW FL INNER JOIN TM_USERXM U ON U.USER_NUMB = FL.USER_NUMB LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM F ON F.FILE_NUMB = U.PROF_NUMB WHERE FL.FLOW_NUMB = #{userNumb} ORDER BY CASE WHEN U.USER_NUMB = #{loginUserNumb} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END , FL.REGI_DATE DESC , U.USER_NUMB DESC
